extension.name: pure-skills
extension.notes: Extension-level inspiration and upstream review registry. One primary upstream per extension, plus secondary inspiration sources.

upstream.name: Anthropic Skill Creator
adopted: description as the primary trigger surface
slightly proactive but honest trigger wording
intentionallyNotAdopted: review viewer server and browser-heavy eval flow
packaging as a core part of create-skill
upstream.notes: Primary upstream inspiration for the pure-skills extension. Borrowed selectively and adapted to Pi conventions rather than mirrored.

sources.name: 0xKobold skill-creator
sources.notes: `init_skill.py` is annotated as adapted from 0xKobold's skill-creator (MIT License), but the exact source URL was not recorded and should be filled in later if recovered.

reviewLog.summary: Reviewed the full skill-creator package and imported the main create-time ideas into create-skill and AUTHORING.md.
findings: Heavy benchmark/eval machinery was intentionally left out.

reviewLog.summary: Reviewed the full package again and documented worthwhile future imports in planned skill scaffolds.
findings: evaluate-skill should critique weak evals, not just outputs.
optimize-skill-description should use substantive trigger evals and a holdout split.
validate-skill should stay tiny and schema-focused.

changeCandidates.summary: Carry over the lightweight quick-validate pattern as a future small validator companion.
Carry over substantive trigger evals, user-intent framing, and holdout-based optimization ideas.
Carry over eval-quality critique so evaluation judges the test itself, not just the output.
